summary: Bug-fix verification (frontend only): Home sidebar 'Mahalleden Mırıltılar' links now use react-router <Link> and perform SPA navigation to /fisilti/<id> without a full page reload. Verified using a window sentinel value that survives the click. WhisperDetail page renders whisper body, vote controls, 'Geri' back link and 'Okur Mektupları' comments form correctly. All adjacent internal navigation also tested: whisper card content link, masthead logo, masthead 'Fısıltı Yaz' (logged in), whisper author link — all are SPA navigations.

issues: GET /api/auth/me still emits two 401 console errors on initial anonymous load — carried over from iteration_1; cosmetic only.

critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx now correctly imports Link from react-router-dom and uses <Link to={`/fisilti/${w.whisper_id}`}> for the sidebar — no remaining <a href> for internal routes in Home.jsx.

WhisperCard.jsx already uses <Link> for content body, comments and author. The author-link onClick stopPropagation is defensive but no longer strictly needed because the parent is also a <Link> (not a click handler) — minor cleanup possibility, not a bug.
Masthead.jsx uses <Link> for logo/profile/login/register and useNavigate() for compose/logout — consistent and correct.
test_credentials: muhabir1@fisilti.com / Test1234! (verified working for login + compose nav test).
seed_data_creation: No new seed data needed — preview DB already had >=6 whispers (kahvehane/berber/etc.) seeded in iteration_1, so sidebar 'Mahalleden Mırıltılar' was populated.
context_for_next_testing_agent: SPA-navigation verification trick used: before clicking, set `window.__sentinel = 'x'` then click the <Link>; if the value survives, no full reload occurred. Sidebar testids are `sidebar-link-<whisper_id>`. The detail page uses `Geri` text (not a data-testid) for the back link — consider adding data-testid='whisper-detail-back-link' if more granular detail-page tests are needed.
rca of the issue: Original bug: Home.jsx 'Mahalleden Mırıltılar' sidebar used <a href={`/fisilti/${id}`}> which triggers a full document load. In the Emergent preview iframe this caused visible reloads / iframe-host conflicts. Fix: replaced <a> with react-router <Link to={...}> and added `import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'`. Verification: post-click `window.__sentinel` value persisted, confirming SPA navigation; WhisperDetail page rendered content + comments form correctly.
